name: ruby-builder
title: ruby-builder
description:
Builders for XML MarkUps
Builder provides a number of builder objects that make creating structured data
simple to do.  Currently the following builder objects are supported:
.
* XML Markup
* XML Events
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-builder because Builders for XML MarkUps.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-builder as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-builder with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-builder --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
